intent: Take patient samples from regular 96-well plates and spread them out into 384-well plates for PCR setup. Each sample gets copied to 4 spots in the bigger plate, and you can choose whether to include negative controls or skip them.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute samples to 384 well plates
output_schema.author: Steve Plonk <protocols@opentrons.com>
